description: News aggregation system for Indian fintech with category-wise ChromaDB collections and email notifications

stories.title: Project Setup and Configuration System
stories.description: Create directory structure, requirements.txt, and YAML configuration files for sources, competitors, clients, keywords, and email routing
acceptanceCriteria: Directory structure created as per plan (config/, src/, data/, scripts/)
requirements.txt includes: chromadb, feedparser, playwright, requests, pyyaml, apscheduler, pydantic, beautifulsoup4, ollama
config/sources.yaml has RSS feeds for tech, industry, competitor, clients categories
config/competitors.yaml lists at least 5 competitors with keywords
config/clients.yaml has lenders and merchants sections with keywords
config/keywords.yaml has industry and tech keywords
config/email.yaml has SMTP settings and routing rules

stories.title: Pydantic Data Models
stories.description: Create Pydantic models for Article, Source, Competitor, Client, EmailConfig with validation
acceptanceCriteria: Article model has all fields: id, title, url, source, published_at, fetched_at, content, content_hash, embedding, category, matched_keywords, competitor_mentions, client_mentions, tags, email_routing
Category enum with values: tech, industry, competitor, clients
ClientType enum with values: lender, merchant
Source, Competitor, ClientConfig, EmailConfig models defined
All models have proper type hints and validation

stories.title: Ollama Embedding Integration
stories.description: Create embedder module that interfaces with Ollama local API for generating text embeddings
acceptanceCriteria: OllamaEmbedder class created in src/processors/embedder.py
embed() method returns list[float] for single text
embed_batch() method handles multiple texts efficiently
Configurable model (default: nomic-embed-text) and base_url
Handles Ollama connection errors gracefully
Returns embeddings with correct dimensions (768 for nomic-embed-text)

stories.title: Category-Wise ChromaDB Storage
stories.description: Create 4 separate ChromaDB collections (tech, industry, competitor, clients) with vector storage
acceptanceCriteria: VectorStore class created in src/storage/vector_store.py
4 collections created: tech_articles, industry_articles, competitor_articles, clients_articles
add_article() stores article with embedding in correct collection
article_exists() checks URL in specific collection
semantic_duplicate() checks similarity within collection using embedding
get_collection() returns correct collection by category
Persistent storage in data/chroma_db/

stories.title: Category Classifier and Entity Detection
stories.description: Classify articles into categories and detect competitor/client mentions with auto-tagging
acceptanceCriteria: Classifier class assigns category based on keyword priority: competitor > client > industry > tech
detect_competitors() returns list of matched competitor names
detect_clients() returns list of dicts with name and type (lender/merchant)
Tagger class auto-generates tags from content (funding, acquisition, RBI_regulation, etc.)
EmailRouter computes routing decision with recipients, priority based on entities and tags

stories.title: RSS Fetchers
stories.description: Implement RSS fetchers for Google News, Hacker News, and Medium feeds
acceptanceCriteria: BaseFetcher abstract class with fetch() method
RSSFetcher implements Google News RSS parsing
HNFetcher implements Hacker News API fetching
MediumFetcher handles Medium RSS feeds
All fetchers return standardized Article objects
Handles network errors gracefully
Respects rate limits between requests

stories.title: Web Scraper with Playwright
stories.description: Implement headless browser scraper for dynamic content extraction
acceptanceCriteria: WebScraper class using Playwright
scrape_url() extracts article title, content, published date
Uses readability-lxml or similar for content extraction
Configurable CSS selectors for different sites
Handles JavaScript-rendered content
Respects robots.txt and rate limits

stories.title: Email Notification System
stories.description: Send email notifications per category with HTML templates and routing logic
acceptanceCriteria: EmailNotifier class with SMTP client wrapper
send_article_alert() sends immediate alerts for high priority
send_digest() batches multiple articles
HTML email template with article cards showing title, snippet, URL, tags, entities
Subject line includes category and entity names
Routes to correct recipients based on entity-specific rules, then tag rules, then category defaults
Deduplicates recipients across multiple matching rules

stories.title: Hybrid Search Per Category
stories.description: Implement semantic + keyword search within each ChromaDB collection
acceptanceCriteria: HybridSearch class in src/search/hybrid_search.py
search() method takes category, query, and optional keyword filters
Semantic search using Ollama embeddings
Keyword filtering on title, content, tags, entities
Configurable number of results (default: 10)
Filter by client_type for clients category
Filter by specific competitor or client name

stories.title: CLI Interface
stories.description: Create CLI for manual fetch, search, and email testing
acceptanceCriteria: python -m src.main fetch --all fetches all categories
python -m src.main fetch --category <cat> fetches specific category
python -m src.main fetch --category clients --client-type lender works
python -m src.main search --category <cat> <query> searches within category
python -m src.main test-email sends test email
All commands have --help with usage info

stories.title: Cron Scheduling
stories.description: Implement scheduled job runner that fetches news every 3 hours and sends notifications
acceptanceCriteria: cron.py uses APScheduler to run every 3 hours
Fetches all categories in sequence
Sends email notifications for new articles
Logs summary of fetched articles and sent emails
Handles errors gracefully, continues with next category on failure
Can run manually: python cron.py

stories.title: End-to-End Integration
stories.description: Full integration test - fetch, classify, store, and notify
acceptanceCriteria: Running python -m src.main fetch --all successfully fetches and stores articles
Articles are classified into correct collections
Duplicate articles are not re-stored
Email notifications are sent for new articles
Search returns relevant results
All tests pass: pytest tests/
